headline: How The Investment Story For Krispy Kreme (DNUT) Is Quietly Shifting With New Analyst Targets
summary: Krispy Kreme’s analyst price target has edged from US$3.95 to US$4, a small move that still matters if you are tracking how sentiment around the stock is forming. Recent commentary describes the stance as mixed but generally constructive, with some analysts lifting targets while still flagging limits to upside at current levels. Read on to see what is driving this updated target range and how you can keep track of the evolving story around Krispy Kreme’s valuation. Stay updated as the Fair...
